name: Lublin Voivodeship (Poland)

colors.symbolism: the silver field of the historic Lublin coat of arms
from the historic Lublin coat of arms
the gold of the deer charge on the coat of arms

description: Three horizontal stripes of white, red, and yellow, with the red stripe half the width of the others.
history: Adopted by the Lublin Voivodeship after its formation in 1999, drawing on the heraldic tinctures of the historic region.

features.symbolism: the heraldic colours of the historic Lublin land
